name: com.apple.asam
title: Autonomous Single App Mode
description: The payload that configures Autonomous Single App mode.

payloadkeys.content: An array of dictionaries that specifies the apps that the system grants access to the Accessibility APIs.

subkeys.content: A dictionary that specifies an app that can be granted access to the Accessibilty APIs.
The unique bundle identifier. If two dictionaries contain the same `BundleIdentifier` value but a different `TeamIdentifier` value, an error occurs and the profile won't be installed.
The developer's team identifier that the system used when it signed the app.
